name: 太子寢宮（禁地式場景）
description: 太子寢宮是一個高壓禁區——前任宮女被杖斃、太子拒絕一切人接近。女主每次進入都是一次生死考驗，空間本身就是張力來源。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: Guards, take her out of here. 50 strokes of the cane and banish her from the Eastern Palace. ... 50 strokes of the cane, that person will surely perish. ... If you don't want to perish, then get out.
examples.context: 太子寢宮是一個高壓禁區——前任宮女被杖斃、太子拒絕一切人接近。女主每次進入都是一次生死考驗，空間本身就是張力來源。
